title: KK Slider - Sparta Remix
description:
Nothing super special... I've wanted to make a Sparta remix, and I've wanted to upload more KK Slider songs, so I figured I'd kill two birds with one stone.

Made the base entirely by ear... Then slapped KK's voice over it. Enjoy!

Also, MP3's uploaded; just for the hell of it. Contains this version (the Acoustic version) and a version using the normal Sparta base. (The full Sparta remix sounds better.)
http://ciancijr2.webs.com/KKSparta.zip

Made using a soundfont ripped from the AC:WW rom, which I've compiled and uploaded for you to use here:
https://www.dropbox.com/s/e7090fg2g8730wt/KK%20Slider%20Soundfont.zip
